digest.title: Alibaba to ban Claude Code in workplace over alleged backdoor risks, source says

digest.tldr: At the event "The Briefing: AI for Science" earlier this week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, a new "AI workbench for scientists" that pulls fragmented tools and datasets into one environment, and generates figures…
